justification: The diff successfully migrates javax.* to jakarta.* and updates Spring Boot to 3.3.13, but it doesn't leverage any Java 21-specific idioms (records, pattern matching, virtual threads, etc.). It removes deprecated javax dependencies and updates Hibernate imports correctly, though it removes some unused imports (like HashSet) which is good cleanup. The diff is coherent with no spurious changes, but the lack of Java 21 features limits the idiomatic score.
